Module 3: Seed Launch, Part 3
!
Executive Summary
Key Lesson: You don’t need a big list to perform a Seed Launch - 50-300
is OK (bigger is OK too). The main thing is that you want between 30-60
people during the training for interactivity.
The goal here is to create a product - this is the fastest, easiest way. Once
you have the product you can do a launch with 1-2 JV partners which will
help you build your list. Building a list this size is not difficult - go through
the list building course in PLF to learn how.
• 	Example: be a valuable member in a forum, offer an ethical bribe, social
media, etc.
By doing this interactively you learn how to teach and you learn what your
students (and prospects) want. If you have less than 30 people in your
Seed launch that’s okay, as long as they are very motivated.
If you have a group and you’re sure they’re rabid you may be able to get
away with 10-12 people, but in general you want 30-60. I initially had 6-9
people sign up for the PLF Seed Launch.
I was then able to fill it up to the 30-40 range by using personal contacts.
Look at your personal contacts and relationships to get 10-20 more people.
The great thing is these people will be more involved in general.
!

-- 1 of 3 --

Rough General Timeline for Your Seed Launch
• 	Day 1: initial announcement
• 	Day 3: follow up - answer questions
• 	Day 5: program details
• 	Day 7: release program - send them to sales video/letter (3-4 day open
cart)
• 	Day 8: follow up, social proof
• 	Day 9: scarcity and social proof
• 	Day 10: scarcity, social proof, and close program (maybe 2 emails)
• 	Day 11: start program
• 	Day 18: second module
• 	Day 25: third module
• 	Can be anywhere from 3 to XX modules - the sweet spot is 3-5 modules
• 	Immediately after program ends starts building program for full launch
• 	Edit videos, get them transcribed, add bonuses
• 	Or take everything you teach and just redo it as recorded video
!
!

-- 2 of 3 --

Summary and Action Steps
Get a list of 50-300 people or gather an audience of highly motivated
contacts
Make it interactive - learn to teach and ask questions
Decide on a final timeline for your Seed Launch
Build your product immediately after program ends
!
